question:
An aircraft has four engines (i.e., two engines on each wing) but can land using just at least any two engines. Assume that the reliability of each engine for the duration of a flight mission is $\mathrm{R}_{\mathrm{e}}=0.98$ and that engine failures are independent.
(a) Calculate the mission reliability of the aircraft.
(b) If at least one functioning engine must be on each wing, calculate the
mission reliability.
